body.description: On January 20, 2024, we approved your Form I-485, Application to Register Permanent Residence or Adjust Status. We will mail your new Permanent Resident Card (Green Card) to you within 30 days.
body.statusEsDesc: El 20 de enero de 2024, aprobamos su Formulario I-485, Solicitud para Registrar Residencia Permanente o Ajustar Estatus. Le enviaremos su nueva Tarjeta de Residente Permanente (Tarjeta Verde) dentro de los 30 días.

historicalCaseStatuses.description: On February 5, 2024, we mailed your new Permanent Resident Card.
historicalCaseStatuses.descriptionEsDesc: El 5 de febrero de 2024, enviamos su nueva Tarjeta de Residente Permanente.

historicalCaseStatuses.description: On January 20, 2024, we approved your Form I-485.
historicalCaseStatuses.descriptionEsDesc: El 20 de enero de 2024, aprobamos su Formulario I-485.

historicalCaseStatuses.description: On November 1, 2023, we scheduled your interview.
historicalCaseStatuses.descriptionEsDesc: El 1 de noviembre de 2023, programamos su entrevista.

historicalCaseStatuses.status: Response to Request for Evidence Was Received
historicalCaseStatuses.description: On September 28, 2023, we received your response to our request for evidence.
historicalCaseStatuses.descriptionEsDesc: El 28 de septiembre de 2023, recibimos su respuesta a nuestra solicitud de evidencia.

historicalCaseStatuses.description: On July 15, 2023, we sent you a request for evidence.
historicalCaseStatuses.descriptionEsDesc: El 15 de julio de 2023, le enviamos una solicitud de evidencia.

historicalCaseStatuses.description: On April 10, 2023, we scheduled your biometrics appointment.
historicalCaseStatuses.descriptionEsDesc: El 10 de abril de 2023, programamos su cita de datos biométricos.

historicalCaseStatuses.description: On March 20, 2023, we received your case.
historicalCaseStatuses.descriptionEsDesc: El 20 de marzo de 2023, recibimos su caso.
